data.narrative:
Cailabs is a Series C–stage Space & Aerospace company that has raised €57M+ to date. The comparable universe includes five public Space & Aerospace peers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and eight private companies at the same stage, with the most relevant peers being Axiom Space ($2.5B), Impulse Space ($1.8B), Varda Space Industries ($1.5B), Skyryse ($1.1B), and Isar Aerospace ($1.0B).

Peer-median valuation is the primary applicable method here. Across the five same-sector, same-stage private comparables, the median valuation is $1.5B, with a range of $1.0B to $2.5B. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied, as Cailabs does not publicly disclose revenue; the public Space & Aerospace median P/S stands at 59.8x across five tickers, but without a revenue figure this multiple cannot be meaningfully applied to the target.

The triangulation yields a valuation range of $1.3B (low) to $1.7B (high), with a median of $1.5B. This range is driven entirely by the peer-median method. Key uncertainties include Cailabs's actual revenue trajectory relative to peers, the sustainability of public-market multiples in the sector, and the target's competitive positioning within the broader Space & Aerospace ecosystem, none of which are quantified in available data.
